The [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech]] '''F-Web repeating blaster''' was the successor of the famous [[E-Web heavy repeating blaster/Legends|E-Web heavy repeating blaster]]. As such, it possessed increased power and was outfitted with a shield that could be operated by a third person. Like the E-Web, it served an anti-infantry role, as well as being collapsible, allowing for quick deployment. This made them a valuable asset in an army.

==Appearances==
*''[[Han Solo at Stars' End]]'' {{1st}}
